title: Add Register Agent form to /agents page
implementation_notes: Body: { name: string, role: string, model: string, provider: string }. All fields required.
Generates id = name (slugified). Writes vault/shared/agents/{id}.md with YAML frontmatter matching the existing agent schema (see vault/shared/agents/agent-backend-dev.md for the expected shape).
Returns 201 with the created agent record. Returns 409 if an agent with the same id already exists.
In agents/index.vue, add a 'Register Agent' button next to 'Spawn Custom Agent' in the header.
On click: open an inline form (below the header) with fields: Agent ID/name, Role description, Model (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6), Provider (anthropic/openai/etc).
On submit: POST /api/vault/agents, then re-fetch registeredAgents list to show the new card without reload.
On error: show inline error in the form.
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/vault/agents creates vault/shared/agents/{id}.md with valid frontmatter.
The new agent appears in the 'Registered Vault Agents' grid immediately after creation.
Duplicate id returns 409 with a clear message shown in the form.
Existing agent cards and Launch Process functionality are unaffected.
completion_summary: Added POST /api/vault/agents and wired the Register Agent form to create vault agent records immediately in the /agents registry view.
